rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Task description said fix src/utils/helpers.ts, but that file already had export default — the real build-breaking errors were in src/pages/ files.","scope":"build diagnostics"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Next.js Pages Router requires every file in src/pages/ to have a default export; named-only exports cause build failures.","scope":"Next.js Pages Router"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Components (not pages) in src/pages/ should be moved out rather than given a dummy default export.","scope":"src/pages/"}]}
